hero.role: Full Stack Developer — Angular · Next.js · Node.js · Laravel
hero.summary: I build production-ready web platforms that businesses rely on daily. From telecom dashboards to real-time systems, I deliver clean, scalable solutions that solve real operational problems — not just write code.

svc1.title: Web Applications
svc1.desc: Full stack apps with Angular, Next.js & Laravel

about.sub: Full Stack Developer with a National Engineering Diploma — fully recognized as equivalent to a Master's degree.
about.bio: I build secure, high-performance web applications and digital solutions that help businesses scale. Specializing in reliable software architecture, real-time features, and data-driven systems, I focus on turning complex challenges—such as cloud migrations, advanced system security, and automated monitoring—into seamless, user-friendly experiences that drive business value.

skills.sub: From modern frontends to scalable backends and DevOps pipelines.

exp.sub: Four chapters at Infraway — from intern to production-grade Full Stack Developer.

job1.title: Full Stack Developer — Angular / Laravel
job1.desc: Nouara Platform — Telecom Eligibility, Billing & Operations Dashboard
job1.b1: Developing and maintaining Nouara, a production telecom platform (Angular 20 frontend + Laravel 12 backend API)
job1.b2: Migrated ticket attachment storage to RustFS (S3-compatible) hosted on a dedicated VM
job1.b3: Implemented JWT authentication via httpOnly cookies with 2FA on a dedicated security branch
job1.b4: Built a real-time anomaly detection system with IQR-based alerting and SMTP notifications via Office365
job1.b5: Developed operational dashboards for internal teams

job2.title: AI Voice Translation Assistant for Telephony (Proof of Concept)
job2.desc: Real-Time AI-Powered Voice Translation Assistant for Telephony
job2.b1: Integrated Asterisk + FastAGI with a Flask/Python backend to route and process live telephony voice streams in real time
job2.b2: Evaluated a chained STT → Translation → TTS model pipeline using Hugging Face pre-trained models for bilingual voice translation
job2.b3: Prototyped end-to-end system integration between telephony infrastructure and AI inference services as a proof of concept

job3.title: AI & Data Engineering Intern
job3.desc: Predictive Analytics Tool for Telephony & Business Metrics
job3.b1: Preprocessed and cleaned historical telephony datasets with Pandas to prepare features for forecasting models
job3.b2: Built baseline regression models to forecast telephony KPIs (ACR, ACD, Revenue) for business intelligence reporting

job4.title: Software Engineering Intern
job4.b1: Designed and deployed a Grafana monitoring dashboard tracking real-time infrastructure health and system uptime metrics

proj.sub: Software applications and static designs built for clients and experiments.

rizz.title: Rizz — Real-Time Video Chat
rizz.desc: Building an Omegle-style random video chat app with real-time peer matching, room management, and user moderation features. Monorepo architecture for clean separation of concerns.

ai.title: AI Voice Translation for Telephony
ai.desc: Real-time bilingual voice translation assistant integrated into live phone calls via Asterisk + FastAGI. Powered by Hugging Face models for STT, translation, and TTS — built on a scalable Flask/Python backend.

lp1.title: Custom Landing Page One
lp1.desc: A modern, interactive static landing page built utilizing custom CSS variables, responsive typography, and semantic HTML layouts.

lp2.title: Custom Landing Page Two
lp2.desc: An optimized single-page landing layout featuring clean UI configurations and mobile-first responsive design implementation.

lp3.title: Custom Landing Page Three
lp3.desc: A responsive landing page design focused on smooth layouts, navigation adjustments, and clean structural aesthetics.

concept.intro: I don't just wait for clients to ask for designs — I proactively build solutions. These are two fully functional web prototypes I built from scratch to demonstrate rapid-prototyping and high-converting UX for the e-commerce and digital rewards spaces.
concept.ctatext: Want a custom, proactive prototype built specifically for your business to see what's possible?

souq.title: Souq Digital
souq.desc: A sleek, modern digital marketplace concept designed to maximize product visibility and drive seamless checkouts — turning a cluttered e-commerce store into a frictionless, conversion-driven shopping experience.
souq.b2: Card-based layout that scales across mobile and desktop

redeemly.title: Redeemly
redeemly.desc: An engaging, trust-building landing page for a digital rewards and loyalty platform, designed with psychology-driven layout choices to make the "redeem" process feel intuitive and exciting.
redeemly.b2: Narrative flow from discovery to sign-up
redeemly.b3: Designed for user retention and engagement

edu.sub: Engineering training in Computer Science & Software Engineering.

diploma.title: National Engineering Diploma
diploma.desc: Computer Science & Software Engineering. Specialization in Software Engineering & Data Science. Recognized as equivalent to a Master's degree.

prep.title: Integrated Preparatory Cycle
prep.desc: Two-year intensive program in Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science — building the analytical foundation for engineering studies.

langs.sub: Four languages across three language families.

contact.text: Open to Full Stack roles, freelance projects, and collaborations. Feel free to reach out — I usually reply within 24 hours.
